classification_definitions.ACTIVE: Clearly governed script allowed only within its documented DRY_RUN or validation role. ACTIVE does not approve APPLY, worker launch, runtime execution, commit, or push.
classification_definitions.HELPER: Support script intended to be called by an approved script, validator, or operator workflow. Not an independent operator entry point.
classification_definitions.BLOCKED: Must not be run until separately reviewed, repaired, or explicitly approved with exact scope, validation, and stop point.
classification_definitions.LEGACY: Historical or imported script retained as reference evidence only. Not active authority and not safe to run by default.
classification_definitions.ARCHIVE: Candidate for future reference-only handling after dependency review. No move, delete, or rename is approved by this registry.
classification_definitions.REVIEW_REQUIRED: Insufficient evidence to classify as safe. Treat as blocked from execution until reviewed.

risk_policy_interaction.policy: RISK_POLICY.md overrides this registry. If a registry entry appears to weaken RISK_POLICY.md, the stricter safety rule wins.
blocked_boundaries: automatic escalation from output into execution authority

topology_guard_interaction.policy: Launcher and lane topology checks should reject commands that target unregistered scripts or scripts classified as BLOCKED, LEGACY, ARCHIVE, or REVIEW_REQUIRED.

validator_consumption.policy: Validators may read this registry as evidence only. Validator output does not approve execution.
future_checks: Confirm every executable script under scoped orchestration paths has a registry entry.
Block DRY_RUN scripts that write files unless a separate approved repair changes the behavior or classification.
Block APPLY, git commit, git push, runtime, worker launch, browser launch, or process launch scripts unless explicit approval evidence is supplied.
Report unknown or malformed registry values as BLOCKED or REVIEW_REQUIRED.

scripts.purpose: Clean-state gate for operator launch readiness.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Allowed as a readiness check only; output is evidence, not approval.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: May be used before launcher decisions.
scripts.validator_consumption: Validators may treat this as an approved readiness gate.
scripts.next_safe_action: Keep read-only and validate before routing from launchers.

scripts.purpose: Preflight preview for AI_OS orchestration readiness.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: DRY_RUN preflight only.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Allowed only as preview evidence.
scripts.validator_consumption: May be checked for presence by router validators.
scripts.next_safe_action: Keep as DRY_RUN-only.

scripts.purpose: Operator loop preview without APPLY.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Allowed only because it is the DRY_RUN counterpart, not the APPLY script.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Must remain preview-only.
scripts.validator_consumption: Validators should confirm it does not execute git mutation.
scripts.next_safe_action: Keep separate from APPLY loop.

scripts.purpose: Read-only operator control-loop status.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Registered as HELPER only. Control-loop status output is evidence, not execution authority.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Not a launcher; callers must remain separately classified and governed.
scripts.validator_consumption: May be consumed by validators or status displays as read-only helper evidence.
scripts.next_safe_action: Keep helper-only and read-only.

scripts.purpose: Validates terminal lane topology before launch decisions.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Guard output is evidence only and cannot approve launch.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Primary topology guard.
scripts.validator_consumption: May consume topology registry and should later consume this execution registry.
scripts.next_safe_action: Extend in a future approved task to check execution registry classifications.

scripts.purpose: Read-only guard status helper for operator and validator consumption.

scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Not a launcher; callers must remain separately classified and governed.
scripts.validator_consumption: May be consumed by validators or status displays as read-only helper evidence.

scripts.purpose: Report-only execution classification validator.

scripts.purpose: Simulate AI_OS file lock claims and report overlap or policy-block risks without changing the lock registry.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Lock claim output is simulation evidence only; it does not approve a real lock claim or worker ownership change.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: May be consumed as a helper only; must not route APPLY or launch work.
scripts.validator_consumption: Validators may use the simulation result as read-only collision evidence.
scripts.next_safe_action: Keep DRY_RUN simulation-only unless a separate APPLY lane authorizes lock registry mutation.

scripts.purpose: Simulate AI_OS file lock releases and print release eligibility without changing the lock registry.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Lock release output is simulation evidence only; it does not approve releasing an active lock.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: May be consumed as a helper only; must not route APPLY or launch work.
scripts.validator_consumption: Validators may use the simulation result as read-only release evidence.
scripts.next_safe_action: Keep DRY_RUN simulation-only unless a separate APPLY lane authorizes lock registry mutation.

scripts.purpose: Print validator worker identity and readiness text without performing validation, commit, push, or worker execution.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Worker banner output is informational only and must not be treated as worker launch approval.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: May be consumed as a helper only; must not start a worker loop or custom worker process.
scripts.validator_consumption: Validators may treat this as display-only worker metadata.
scripts.next_safe_action: Keep display-only; route real worker execution through separately approved worker lanes.

scripts.purpose: Export read-only PR and local Git state handoff packets to stdout in Markdown or JSON.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Runs read-only gh and git inspection commands; output is handoff evidence and not merge, push, or cleanup approval.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: May be used as a report helper only; must not open PRs, merge PRs, or clean branches.
scripts.validator_consumption: Validators may consume the stdout/JSON handoff as read-only PR evidence.
scripts.next_safe_action: Keep report-only; any PR mutation requires a separate approved PR lane.

scripts.purpose: Print a read-only operator status summary from git status, runtime examples, and validator dry-run evidence.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Runs read-only status and validator checks; warnings are evidence only and do not authorize APPLY, staging, commit, push, or runtime action.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: May be used as an operator report helper only; must not become a launcher or queue runner.
scripts.validator_consumption: Validators may consume its summary as read-only operator status evidence.
scripts.next_safe_action: Keep report-only; any mutation must be handled by a separate approved lane.

scripts.purpose: Set terminal window/tab title and print active lane identity from an approved lane object.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Terminal identity output is visual context only and must not imply lane approval or execution authority.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: May be used as a bootstrap display helper only; must not launch terminals or workers.
scripts.validator_consumption: Validators may treat this as identity/banner-only evidence.
scripts.next_safe_action: Keep identity-only; lane execution requires separate governed approval.

scripts.purpose: APPLY operator loop.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: APPLY plus git behavior requires separate explicit approval.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Must not be launcher-connected by default.
scripts.validator_consumption: Validators should block unless approval evidence is supplied.
scripts.next_safe_action: Use DRY_RUN counterpart before any explicit APPLY request.

scripts.purpose: Submit work through git commit and push flow.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Commit and push are protected actions.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Must not be launcher-connected by default.
scripts.validator_consumption: Validators should block direct use.
scripts.next_safe_action: Use only after explicit commit and push approval.

scripts.purpose: Open pull request URL with a template.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Opening browser/app is a protected launcher action under workflow routing rules.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Must not be topology-connected by default.
scripts.validator_consumption: Validators should require explicit approval evidence.
scripts.next_safe_action: Review as a future approved PR helper if needed.

scripts.purpose: Start persistent runtime supervisor.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Runtime and background execution are protected.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Must not be topology-connected by default.
scripts.validator_consumption: Validators should block unless runtime launch approval exists.
scripts.next_safe_action: Keep blocked until runtime execution task is explicitly approved.

scripts.purpose: Advance runtime packet state.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Runtime mutation requires explicit scope and validation.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Must not be launcher-connected by default.
scripts.validator_consumption: Validators should block unapproved packet advancement.

scripts.purpose: Create a work packet.

scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Not a launcher.
scripts.validator_consumption: Validators should require approval evidence for packet creation.
scripts.next_safe_action: Create packets only through approved APPLY workflow.

scripts.purpose: Move or update packet state.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Packet state mutation requires explicit approval.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Not a launcher.
scripts.validator_consumption: Validators should block unapproved state movement.
scripts.next_safe_action: Preview packet state before approved mutation.

scripts.purpose: Add item to command queue despite DRY_RUN filename.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: DRY_RUN scripts that write files are invalid until repaired or reclassified through approved work.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Must not be routed as DRY_RUN helper.
scripts.validator_consumption: Validators should flag DRY_RUN write behavior.
scripts.next_safe_action: Repair naming or behavior in a separate approved task.

scripts.purpose: Update runtime memory despite DRY_RUN filename.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Runtime mutation and DRY_RUN write behavior are blocked.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Must not be routed as DRY_RUN helper.
scripts.validator_consumption: Validators should flag DRY_RUN write behavior.
scripts.next_safe_action: Repair naming or behavior in a separate approved task.

scripts.purpose: Create worker script and update registry despite DRY_RUN filename.

scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Must not be routed as DRY_RUN helper.

scripts.next_safe_action: Repair naming or behavior in a separate approved task.

scripts.purpose: Controlled APPLY lane with commit and push prompts.

scripts.purpose: Process approval files against active packets and optionally route packet state changes.

scripts.purpose: Build a PR lane readiness packet and recommend next PR or Git commands.

scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Keep as approval-required PR flow evidence; never auto-run recommended mutation commands.

scripts.purpose: Open or preview opening a GitHub pull request for the current branch.

scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Block from automated launch until a scoped PR creation approval exists.
scripts.validator_consumption: May be registered as blocked PR mutation risk.
scripts.next_safe_action: Keep blocked or approval-gated until explicit operator approval.

scripts.purpose: Merge or preview merging a GitHub pull request after approval checks.

scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Block from automated launch until a scoped merge approval exists.
scripts.validator_consumption: May be registered as blocked PR mutation risk.
scripts.next_safe_action: Keep blocked or approval-gated until explicit operator approval.

scripts.purpose: Validate and execute a runtime self-route recommended command.
scripts.risk_policy_notes: Uses Invoke-Expression on a recommended command after validation; runtime command execution must remain blocked.
scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Do not permit automated runtime self-routing from registry classification alone.
scripts.validator_consumption: May be registered as blocked runtime mutation and process execution risk.
scripts.next_safe_action: Keep blocked or approval-gated until explicit operator approval.

scripts.purpose: Invoke approval processing for packet advancement planning or Apply-mode progression.

scripts.validator_consumption: May be registered as approval-required packet advancement risk.
scripts.next_safe_action: Keep blocked or approval-gated until explicit operator approval.

scripts.purpose: Read operator queue, approvals, packet state, and Git status to recommend next operator commands.

scripts.validator_consumption: May be registered as approval-required queue runner evidence.
scripts.next_safe_action: Keep blocked or approval-gated until explicit operator approval.

scripts.purpose: Preview adding an item to a worker inbox queue.

scripts.next_safe_action: Keep blocked or approval-gated until explicit operator approval.

scripts.purpose: Preview worker task state transitions.

scripts.purpose: Creates or updates a pull request template artifact.

scripts.purpose: Saves workspace checkpoint state to JSON.

scripts.purpose: Generates Codex handoff text with suggested validation and git staging commands.

scripts.purpose: Builds an operator session plan with queue runner, handoff, validator, and git staging recommendations.

scripts.purpose: Display read-only supervisor status for operator and validator consumption.

scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Not a launcher; callers must remain separately classified and governed.

scripts.purpose: Display read-only supervisor dashboard information for operator and validator consumption.

scripts.purpose: Runtime daemon launcher that can repeatedly invoke runtime cycle scripts.

scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Must remain blocked until daemon and runtime topology are separately reviewed.
scripts.validator_consumption: Validators must treat this as blocked daemon launcher evidence.

scripts.purpose: Worker daemon launcher that can repeatedly invoke autonomous worker cycles.

scripts.topology_guard_requirement: Must remain blocked until worker daemon topology is separately reviewed.

scripts.purpose: Worker loop that repeatedly invokes worker inbox inspection.

scripts.purpose: Worker crew launcher that can open Windows Terminal worker lane tabs.

scripts.purpose: Daily startup entry point that can delegate into workspace terminal launch flow.

notes: Entries not listed here remain blocked by default if executable.
This registry does not approve script execution, worker launch, runtime execution, APPLY, commit, push, move, rename, delete, or archive actions.
Future validators should compare scoped executable files against this registry and fail closed on missing or unsafe entries.
